pull_request.title: Bump org.openrewrite:rewrite-bom from 8.73.1 to 8.73.2
pull_request.body:
Bumps [org.openrewrite:rewrite-bom](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite) from 8.73.1 to 8.73.2.
Release notes

Sourced from org.openrewrite:rewrite-bom's releases.

8.73.2

What's Changed

  • Python: Fix parsing of byte strings b'' by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#6734
  • Python: in tests the before_recipe hook to run after idempotence check by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#6735
  • Python: Upgrade ty to 0.0.17 and fix type errors by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6737
  • Fix JDK 25 LinkageError in JavaUnrestrictedClassLoader by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6736
  • Complete Java 24 compatibility fix by backporting UnknownType workaround by @​kdvolder in openrewrite/rewrite#6740
  • Python: Include pyproject.toml in ParseProject results by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6744
  • Fix htmlIndexToVersioning() HTML title attribute handling by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6745
  • JavaScript: in tests the before_recipe hook to run after idempotence check by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#6738
  • Recipe testing best practices by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6748
  • Allow MavenRecipeMarketplaceGenerator to operate on directories of class files by @​sambsnyd in openrewrite/rewrite#6750
  • Redirect pip install output away from console by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite#6751
  • Clarify Maven RemoveDependency recipe impact by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6749
  • Python: Improve dependency recipe lock file handling and version normalization by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6752
  • Parse JS templates as TSX to support JSX syntax by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite#6756
  • ChangeDependencyGroupIdAndArtifactId updates version properties in parent POMs by @​MBoegers in openrewrite/rewrite#6630
  • Python: Support legacy project manifests (setup.cfg etc.) by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6716
  • Fix empty dependencies block left after constraint-to-rule conversion by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#6754
  • Only calculate hex string for valid HTTP responses by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6763
  • WrappingAndBracesVisitor: Preserve indentation by @​NeQuissimus in openrewrite/rewrite#6758
  • Fix AddDependency duplicating dependencies in applied scripts by @​AnastasiiaDesiateryk in openrewrite/rewrite#6650
  • Pass resolvers to JS/Python RPC so PrepareRecipe callbacks can resolve Maven recipes by @​kmccarp in openrewrite/rewrite#6742

New Contributors

  • @​NeQuissimus made their first contribution in openrewrite/rewrite#6758
  • @​AnastasiiaDesiateryk made their first contribution in openrewrite/rewrite#6650

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite/compare/v8.73.1...v8.73.2

Commits
  • 81ecb64 Pass resolvers to JS/Python RPC so PrepareRecipe callbacks can resolve Maven ...
  • 6b5d958 Fix AddDependency duplicating dependencies in applied scripts (#6650)
  • 1bfe6e9 WrappingAndBracesVisitor: Preserve indentation (#6758)
  • 37aca85 Only calculate hex string for valid HTTP responses (#6763)
  • 2ae43a8 Fix empty dependencies block left after constraint-to-rule conversion (#6754)
  • 878b52a Python: Support legacy project manifests (setup.cfg etc.) (#6716)
  • 3e337ad Add onlyExplicitlyIncluded to match other LST implementations
  • 0ae4fbc Add AI category descriptor
  • 86034d0 ChangeDependencyGroupIdAndArtifactId updates version properties in parent P...
  • 715a521 Parse JS templates as TSX to support JSX syntax (#6756)
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

[![Dependabot compatibility score](https://dependabot-badges.githubapp.com/badges/compatibility_score?dependency-name=org.openrewrite:rewrite-bom&package-manager=maven&previous-version=8.73.1&new-version=8.73.2)](https://docs.github.com/en/github/managing-security-vulnerabilities/about-dependabot-security-updates#about-compatibility-scores) Dependabot will resolve any conflicts with this PR as long as you don't alter it yourself. You can also trigger a rebase manually by commenting `@dependabot rebase`. [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-start) [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-end) ---

You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot show ignore conditions` will show all of the ignore conditions of the specified dependency - `@dependabot ignore this major version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this major version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this minor version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this minor version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this dependency` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this dependency (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself)
